utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package contains all 7 items with full details. 'destination' is specified as Prague, Czech Republic. 'travel_dates' are given as June 13–17, 2024, which matches the 5-day requirement. 'transportation' includes flight details with cost, class, baggage, airline type, and cancellation policy—fully specified. 'accommodation' includes hotel name, rating, user rating, location, nights, total price, and cancellation policy—fully covered. 'activities' lists specific activities with individual and total costs—fully covered. 'additional_services' includes restaurant details, average meal price, allergy accommodation, and total cost—fully covered. 'total_budget' provides a detailed cost breakdown with currency—fully covered. Thus, all 7 out of 7 items are included and fully specified.
